HomePage.title: Voley Lisboa
HomePage.intro: Log in or create your player account to manage games in Lisbon.

AccountMenu.confirmLogoutMessage: You will need to log in again to manage games.

AuthPage.title: Log in or sign up
AuthPage.intro: Use your email and password to access your account.
AuthPage.loginIntro: Already have an account? Enter your details to continue.
AuthPage.signupIntro: New players start as regular users. Admins can be promoted later in Supabase.

validation.passwordShort: Password must have at least 8 characters.

errors.invalid-password: Password must have at least 8 characters.
errors.login-failed: We could not log you in with those details.
errors.missing-name: Enter both first and last name to sign up.
errors.email-confirmation-enabled: Signup is still requiring email confirmation. Disable email confirmations in Supabase Auth settings.
errors.signup-failed: We could not create an account with those details.

DashboardPage.title: Hi, {name}.
DashboardPage.intro: Here are the upcoming games currently scheduled for Voley Lisboa.
DashboardPage.emptyGamesIntro: New games will appear here when they are scheduled.
DashboardPage.gamesLoadError: We could not load upcoming games. Please try again.
DashboardPage.createGameValidationError: Check the game details and try again.
DashboardPage.createGameError: We could not create the game. Please try again.
DashboardPage.installIntro: Add the app to your home screen for faster access on matchday.
DashboardPage.installIOSInstructions: In Safari, tap the Share button, then choose Add to Home Screen.

GameDetailPage.leaveGameConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave this game?
GameDetailPage.shareText: Voley Lisboa game: {date}. Come play with us!
GameDetailPage.shareFallbackIntro: Copy this link and send it to the players you want to invite.
GameDetailPage.cancelGameConfirmMessage: Cancel this game? It will remain visible but players will not be able to join.
GameDetailPage.cancelOccurrenceConfirmMessage: Cancel this occurrence? It will remain visible but players will not be able to join.
GameDetailPage.cancelSeriesConfirmMessage: Cancel this occurrence and all future games in this weekly series?
GameDetailPage.deleteScopeIntro: Choose whether to delete only this occurrence or this occurrence and all future games in the weekly series.
GameDetailPage.deleteSeriesConfirmMessage: Delete this occurrence and all future games in this weekly series permanently?
GameDetailPage.joinedGameMessage: You're in. See you on court.
GameDetailPage.joinErrorMessage: We could not add you to this game. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.leaveErrorMessage: We could not remove you from this game. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.waitlistErrorMessage: We could not add you to the waitlist. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.waitlistReorderErrorMessage: We could not reorder the waitlist. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.cancelErrorMessage: We could not cancel this game. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.deleteErrorMessage: We could not delete this game. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.listLoadError: We could not load the roster. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.notFoundIntro: We could not find this game.
GameDetailPage.paymentErrorMessage: We could not update the payment status. Please try again.
GameDetailPage.removePlayerErrorMessage: We could not remove this player. Please try again.

ProfilePage.title: Your profile
ProfilePage.intro: Update the name and photo shown on your account.
ProfilePage.avatarHelp: Choose an image or take a photo.
ProfilePage.avatarCropHelp: Drag to position. Scroll or pinch with two fingers to zoom.
ProfilePage.avatarCropInteractionLabel: Adjust photo crop. Drag to position, scroll or pinch to zoom, and use arrow or plus and minus keys on a keyboard.

errors.cameraPermissionDenied: We could not access the camera. Check the browser permission and try again.
errors.cameraUnavailable: We could not find an available camera. You can choose an image from this device instead.
errors.cameraCaptureFailed: We could not take the photo. Try again or choose an image instead.
errors.notAuthenticated: Log in again to update your profile.
errors.updateFailed: We could not update your profile. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: We could not upload your photo. Please try again.
